functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Brown Bear Guide
pages:
Brown Bear Guide

A Choascraft guide for brown bear facts, redwood encounters, drops, armor, claws, and netherite upgrades.

Fact 1

Brown bears are powerful omnivores. They can eat plants, fish, insects, roots, berries, and meat.

Fact 2

Many brown bears gain large fat reserves before winter. Food matters most before cold seasons arrive.

Fact 3

Bears have strong noses and can smell food from far away.

Fact 4

Bears may stand upright to smell and see better, not only to threaten.

Choascraft Brown Bears

Brown bears roam the redwood wilderness. They are tempted by salmon but cannot currently be tamed.

Combat

Brown bears have heavy melee damage and a stomp-style attack. Respect the reach and do not crowd them.

Drops

Brown bears drop Bear Raw Meat, Brown Bear Fur, and Bear Claw items. Meat and parts can roll in separate pools.

Food

Bear Raw Meat can be cooked into Bear Cooked Meat. Zombie bears drop Bear Rotten Meat instead.

Brown Bear Gear

Brown Bear Fur and Bear Claw items are used to craft the brown bear armor set and brown bear claws.

Crafting

Craft Brown Bear Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots, and Brown Bear Claws from bear parts. The exact recipes are in the bear recipe folder.

Bear Claws

Brown Bear Claws are wearable/usable claw gear. Bear Claw items also act as repair material for bear gear.

Netherite Bear Gear

Upgrade brown bear armor with smithing recipes to make Brown Netherite Bear gear.

Keeper Note

Salmon gets their attention. It does not make them yours. Bring armor before studying one up close.
